scores.correctness_notes: Priority order is wrong: agent lists 'waiting' before 'maintenance', but gold standard specifies maintenance is higher priority than waiting. Agent also lists 'unknown' in the priority order, but gold standard states it is an error to call add_status() with UnknownStatus (or ErrorStatus). Missing the important caveat about ErrorStatus/UnknownStatus being forbidden.
scores.hallucination_notes: Priority order is inverted for maintenance vs waiting (maintenance > waiting, not the other way). Including 'unknown' in the priority list implies you can call add_status(UnknownStatus()), which is incorrect per the gold standard — it is an error to do so.
